name: Cajun Country Supper - Microwave
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Idaho Frozen Hash Brown Potatoes
1/2 lb Kielbasa Sausage (smoked Polish sausage), cut into chunks
1/2 lb Frozen Peeled Shrimp (rinse off any frost)
1 can (16 ounces) Whole Tomatoes in Juice, chopped, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart microwave-safe casserole dish, combine oil, onion, green pepper, celery, garlic, Tabasco sauce, oregano, and thyme.
2. Cover loosely with plastic wrap.
3. Cook on High for 6 to 8 minutes or until just tender, stirring once.
4. Stir in potatoes, kielbasa, shrimp, chopped tomatoes, and tomato sauce.
5. Re-cover; cook on High for 10 to 12 minutes or until shrimp is cooked, stirring once.
6. Garnish with parsley.
Makes 4 servings.
